sections.label: Models
sections.description: Configure LLM providers and default models.

fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: Qualified model name (e.g. openai:gpt-4o)

fields.label: Summarizer Model
fields.description: Model for generating session titles, summaries, and context compression. Defaults to default model.

fields.label: Context Window
fields.description: Maximum tokens for context window.

fields.label: Providers
fields.description: LLM provider connections (name, base URL, API key).

fields.label: Port
fields.description: Port the gateway listens on.

fields.label: Bind
fields.description: Network binding: loopback (localhost only) or lan (all interfaces).

fields.label: Auth Token
fields.description: Bearer token for API authentication.

fields.label: Auth Password
fields.description: Basic auth password.

fields.label: Brave API Key
fields.description: API key for Brave web search.

fields.label: CDP Endpoint
fields.description: Chrome DevTools Protocol endpoint address.

sections.label: Agents
sections.description: Agent defaults and global system prompt.

fields.label: Default Agent
fields.description: Agent ID to use as the default. If empty, the first configured agent is used.

fields.label: System Prompt
fields.description: Custom instructions added to the system prompt for all agents.

sections.label: Summarizer
sections.description: Background session summarizer timing and limits.

fields.label: Tick Interval
fields.description: How often the summarizer runs, in minutes.

fields.label: Startup Delay
fields.description: Delay before the first summarization run, in minutes.

fields.label: Inactivity Time
fields.description: Session inactivity threshold before summarizing, in minutes.

fields.label: Min Messages
fields.description: Minimum number of messages required to summarize a session.

fields.label: Max Conversation Chars
fields.description: Maximum characters of conversation text sent to the LLM.

fields.label: Max Message Chars
fields.description: Maximum characters per individual message.

fields.label: Bot Token
fields.description: Discord bot token.

fields.label: Allowed Users
fields.description: Discord user IDs allowed to interact with the bot.

fields.label: Agent ID
fields.description: Agent to handle Discord messages. Defaults to the configured default agent.

fields.label: Bot Token
fields.description: Telegram bot token.

fields.label: Allowed Users
fields.description: Telegram user IDs allowed to interact with the bot.

fields.label: Agent ID
fields.description: Agent to handle Telegram messages. Defaults to the configured default agent.
